administrator-hint: Full access to everything. Groups and hidden platforms don't apply.
boxart-desc: Choose the boxart style for game cards
cannot-change-own-role: You can't change your own access level.
cleanup-all-confirm: This will permanently delete all missing ROMs{platform} from the database and their resource directories. This action cannot be undone.
cleanup-queued: Cleanup task queued — missing ROMs will be deleted shortly
client-token-confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to revoke this token? Any device using it will lose access.
client-token-confirm-regenerate: This will invalidate the current credential. Any device using the old token will need to be re-paired.
client-token-delivery-hint: This token will not be shown again.
config-file-not-mounted-desc: The config.yml file has not been mounted. Any changes made to the configuration will not persist after the application restarts.
config-file-not-writable-desc: The config.yml file is not writable. Any changes made to the configuration will not persist after the application restarts.
config-file-parse-error-desc: The config.yml file has a syntax error, so RomM is running with default settings and ignoring your configuration. Fix the error and restart RomM to apply your settings. Details: {error}
config-file-parse-error-title: Configuration file could not be parsed!
confirm-protected-launch-desc: Ask before launching a game you marked as Retired or Never Playing.
continue-playing-as-grid-desc: View continue playing ROM cards as a grid at the home page
controller-debug-empty-feed: Press any key or gamepad button to see events here.
controller-debug-test-hint: Button actions are paused here so you can test every button. Hold B / Back to exit.
controller-debug-wake-hint: Press any button on your controller to wake it up.
crt-mode-desc: Give the interface a retro cathode-ray-tube look with scanlines, glow and flicker
debug-overlay-desc: Show a developer overlay (bottom-right) with live breakpoint, viewport, input modality, theme, route, gamepad and performance info.
delete-user-confirm: Delete user "{username}"? This cannot be undone.
delivery-intro: Your token has been created. Choose how to deliver it:
delivery-intro-regenerate: Your previous token has been revoked and a new one generated. Choose how to deliver it:
device-auth-approved-body: You can close this tab. Your device will connect automatically.
device-auth-code-already-handled: This pairing request was already handled.
device-auth-code-expired: This pairing code has expired or was not found.
device-auth-disallowed-label: Your account doesn't have permission for:
device-auth-subheading: A device is requesting access to your RomM library.
disable-animations-desc: Disable all animations in the gallery (CD spinning, cartridge loading, hover videos)
enable-3d-effect-desc: Enable 3D effect for the game/platform/collection cards
enable-experimental-cache-desc: Enable experimental request caching to improve performance (may cause issues)
exclusions-multi-files-desc: File names to exclude from multi-file ROM scanning
exclusions-multi-parts-ext-desc: File extensions to exclude from multi-part ROM scanning
exclusions-multi-parts-files-desc: File names to exclude from multi-part ROM scanning
exclusions-single-ext-desc: File extensions to exclude from single ROM scanning
exclusions-single-files-desc: File names to exclude from single ROM scanning
exclusions-tooltip: Configure which files, extensions, and platforms should be excluded during library scanning. Items added here will be ignored when RomM scans your library.
folder-alias-description: Maps a custom folder name to an official RomM platform. For example, map 'Nintendo-64' to 'n64'.
folder-mappings-mutually-exclusive: Note: a folder cannot be both an alias and a variant.
folder-mappings-tooltip-aliases: Use this to map a folder in your library to an official RomM platform. For example, if your Nintendo 64 games are in a folder named 'Nintendo-64', you can bind it to the 'n64' platform here. This becomes the primary identifier for that platform in RomM.
folder-mappings-tooltip-variants: Use this if you have a separate folder for a platform variant and want it to use the metadata of a main platform. For example, mapping a folder named 'fbneo' as a version of 'arcade' will cause RomM to search for Arcade metadata when scanning 'fbneo' games.
group-delete-confirm: Delete the "{name}" group? Its members fall back to the default group.
group-is-default-hint: New users are assigned to this group automatically.
group-roms-desc: Group versions of the same ROM together in the gallery
group-system-warning: This is a built-in group. Editing it changes what its members can do.
hidden-platforms-hint: These platforms and their games are hidden from this user.
no-tokens-help: No client API tokens found. Create one to start pairing devices.
pair-enter-code-prompt: Enter this code on your device to complete pairing:
pair-expires-shortly: This code expires shortly. Return to the web interface to generate a new one if needed.
pair-scheme-error: Only custom URL schemes are supported for callbacks (no http/https).
password-placeholder: Leave empty to keep current password
perm-own-only-hint: Limited to the user's own items
permission-group-hint: Sets which actions this user can perform across the library.
permission-overrides-hint: Grant or revoke specific actions for this user, on top of their group.
platform-variant-description: Maps a folder to a parent platform's metadata. For example, map 'n64dd' as a variant of 'n64' to inherit N64 metadata.
recently-added-as-grid-desc: View recently added ROM cards as a grid at the home page
reduced-motion-desc: Disable GPU-heavy visuals and animations (background blur, cover effects, spinning discs, motion) for smoother performance on low-powered devices
scan-artwork-overrides-desc: Optionally use a different provider order for specific artwork fields. When off, each field follows the artwork priority above.
scan-artwork-priority-desc: Order the providers used for cover art and screenshots. Providers are tried from top to bottom; disabled ones are skipped.
scan-gamelist-export-desc: Write a gamelist.xml file for ES-DE, Batocera and RetroBAT when a scan completes.
scan-language-placeholder: Add a language code (e.g. en, fr)
scan-language-priority-desc: Order of language codes used by ScreenScraper for descriptions. The first available language wins.
scan-leave-body: You have unsaved scan settings. If you leave now, your changes will be lost.
scan-media-desc: Select which media assets to download during a scan. Only used by ScreenScraper and ES-DE gamelist.xml.
scan-media-note: Box art is always downloaded, regardless of this selection.
scan-metadata-priority-desc: Order the metadata providers used during scans. Providers are tried from top to bottom; disabled ones are skipped.
scan-pegasus-export-desc: Write a metadata.pegasus.txt file for Pegasus when a scan completes.
scan-priority-none-enabled: No providers enabled. Add one below.
scan-region-placeholder: Add a region code (e.g. us, eu, jp)
scan-region-priority-desc: Order of region codes used by IGDB and ScreenScraper for regional variants. The first available region wins.
scan-settings-load-error-desc: The scan settings could not be loaded from the server. Editing is disabled to avoid overwriting your existing configuration.
show-actionbar-desc: Show action bar in the game card always
show-collections-as-grid-desc: View collection cards as a grid at the home page
show-collections-desc: Show collections section at the home page
show-continue-playing-desc: Show continue playing section at the home page
show-game-titles-desc: Always show game titles on game cards
show-home-widgets-desc: Display the widget rail above the home dashboard rows. Hide to drop the entire section.
show-languages-desc: Show language flags in the gallery
show-platforms-as-grid-desc: View platform cards as a grid at the home page
show-platforms-desc: Show platforms section at the home page
show-recently-added-desc: Show recently added ROMs section at the home page
show-regions-desc: Show region flags in the gallery
show-siblings-desc: Show version count in the gallery when "Group ROMs" option is enabled
show-stats-desc: Show stats summary at the home page
show-status-desc: Show status icons in the gallery (backlogged, playing, completed, etc)
show-virtual-collections-desc: Displayed in the homepage and collections sidebar.
tokens-admin-empty: No client API tokens have been created.
ui-version-desc: Preview the new RomM UI (beta). Switching is instant and you can flip back at any time.
users-tokens-empty: No client API tokens found. Create one to start pairing devices.
widget-library-stats-desc: Counts overview of your library: games, platforms, favorites, and more.
widget-random-pick-desc: Suggest a random ROM from your library, with a reroll button to shuffle again.
